title: <div>  4.  Automate &amp Batch Publish Materials Before the Semester Starts</div
content:
4. Automate & Batch Publish Materials Before the Semester Starts
• Pre-load all Canvas modules, even if some stay unpublished.
• This prevents last-minute restructuring and reduces mid-semester stress.

✅ Why This Works:
• Saves you time.
• Prevents mid-semester burnout.
• Allows for flexibility without chaos.

5️⃣ Final Considerations Before We Fully Lock In

Question 1: Are the Alternative Text Proposals Fully Integrated?

✔ Yes, now exists as:
• An extra credit discussion thread where students recommend relevant texts.
• A pathway for dropping two lowest assignments if they submit strong proposals.

Question 2: How Can We Make the Mastery Exam Path More Engaging?

✔ Solution: “Rule of Three” Unlock System
• If students pass three mastery exams with perfect scores, they:
